syswatch.desc: Live terminal task manager dashboard tracking real-time CPU & RAM usage.

webget.desc: High-speed URL resource downloader that runs directly inside your console.

hexview.desc: Inspects raw binary byte maps of local files in side-by-side Hex/ASCII panels.

speedtest.desc: Tests your live network connection and calculates active internet bandwidth speeds.

cryptorate.desc: Fetches and displays live real-time financial trading prices for top crypto coins.

backup.desc: Safely duplicates files or folder structures into a timestamped backup directory.

fsize.desc: Scans your folder and lists the top heaviest files sorted by drive size.

betterhelpme.desc: Launches a graphical CustomTkinter dashboard showing all your commands with live search filters.

organize.desc: Automatically scans a folder and sorts loose files into subfolders based on extension.

dupecheck.desc: Scans a folder and checks file size and data content to locate exact duplicate files.

securenote.desc: Scrambles a text message into a localized hidden format to protect it from casual glances.

battery.desc: Shows current laptop battery percentages, charging profiles, and design metrics.

pingplot.desc: Pings a stable server once per second and draws a real-time graph to track connection spikes.

dict.desc: Connects to a free open API dictionary to look up lexical syntax, meanings, and word types.

timezones.desc: Displays current live timestamps from configured global metropolitan standard time matrices.

currency.desc: Fetches open-source economic asset tables to evaluate direct trading value exchanges.

betterhelpme.desc: Launches a graphical CustomTkinter dashboard showing all your commands with live search filters.

hashcheck.desc: Checks the SHA-256 hash of files.
